_metadata.title: Nigerian States Economic Data
_metadata.description: Comprehensive economic metrics for all 36 Nigerian states + FCT
sources: BudgIT State of States Report 2022 (GDP figures)
NBS Labour Force Survey Annual Report 2023 (Unemployment by state)
NBS GDP Reports Q1-Q2 2024 (National sector splits)
NBS Telecoms GDP by State 2023 (Services contribution reference)
CPPE / World Bank Nigeria / NBS State-level Survey (Infrastructure scores — composite estimate)
NISER N-SEW 2024, BudgIT, NPC (Sector IGR splits — estimated from zonal & sector data)
NBS/OPHI/UNDP — Nigeria Multidimensional Poverty Index 2022 (NBS, Nov 2022). Survey: Nov 2021–Feb 2022, 56,000+ households, all 36 states + FCT. MPI headcount incidence from Appendix D Table D1.
NBS — CPI Monthly Reports Jan–Dec 2024 (state-level food CPI YoY annual averages, old base 2009=100). Published monthly. State tables in each NBS CPI release.

NBS — General Household Survey-Panel Wave 5 (2023/24), published Nov 2024 (NBS + World Bank LSMS). National electricity access: 53.6%; Urban: 82.2%; Rural: 40.4%. Zonal breakdown: SE=74.6%, SW=72.6%, SS=64.2%, NC=52.1%, NE=29.5%, NW=38.4%. State-level figures ESTIMATED from zonal averages calibrated to each state's urban/rural population ratio.
NBS/DMO — Nigerian Domestic & Foreign Debt Q2 2024 (published Nov 2024). Exact domestic and external debt per state. CBN Q2 2024 rate ~₦1,470/$1 used for naira conversion of external debt.
NBS — CPI Monthly Reports 2024 (headline/all-items inflation, state annual averages, old base 2009=100). National 2024 avg ~33.2%. Rebased to 2024=100 from Jan 2025.
notes: GDP figures are BudgIT 2022 estimates in ₦ trillion, adjusted for 2023/2024 nominal growth.
% Nationally = state GDP as % of total Nigerian nominal GDP (~₦210tn in 2024).
GDP YoY is estimated % change based on NBS national sector trends and state economic profiles.
Population YoY is estimated from NPC intercensal projections (2006 census base, 2023 projections).
Unemployment rates sourced from NBS Labour Force Survey 2023 (state-level annual estimates).
Infrastructure score is a composite out of 100, derived from road density, electricity access, broadband penetration, water access, and CPPE state rankings.

IGR sector split (Services/Industry/Agriculture) is estimated per state based on NBS zonal sector data, state economic profiles, and BudgIT state reports. Not directly published by NBS at state level.
FCT Abuja is included as the 37th entry.

MPI: % of population multidimensionally poor (NBS/OPHI National MPI 2022). This is the most authoritative sub-national poverty measure for Nigeria. Sokoto=91% (highest), Ondo=27% (lowest). Borno data is partial (14/27 LGAs surveyed due to insecurity).

food_inflation_pct: Annual average 2024 state food CPI YoY under OLD NBS base (2009=100). National average ~37-40%. NBS rebased to 2024=100 in Jan 2025 — rebased equivalents are ~40-50% lower numerically.

electricity_access_pct: % households with electricity access. NBS GHS-Panel W5 (2023/24) gives zonal figures only. State values are ESTIMATED using zonal averages anchored to state urban/rural ratios. Not directly published by NBS per state.

Inflation ≠ Food inflation. Inflation (headline) covers ALL goods/services. Food inflation covers food items only (52% of basket). In 2024, national headline ~33.2% vs food inflation ~37-40%. State headline figures are ESTIMATED annual averages.

Investment flow in USD millions. VERIFIED only for Lagos ($2,780m) and FCT ($593.6m) from NBS Capital Importation Q1 2024. Ekiti ($12.75m) is a PROXY from same report. All other states are ESTIMATED — NBS only names 2-3 states per quarter report.
total_debt: domestic debt is exact from NBS/DMO Q2 2024 (₦bn). External debt is exact in USD from same report. total_naira_bn is calculated using CBN Q2 2024 rate of ~₦1,470/$1.
investment_flow_mn_usd: All values are in USD millions (mn). Example: Lagos=2780.0mn USD = $2.78bn. FCT=593.6mn USD = $0.59bn. Rivers=320.0mn USD. Benue=8.0mn USD = $8,000,000.

states.MPI_accuracy: VERIFIED — NBS/OPHI MPI 2022, Appendix D Table D1
states.food_inflation_accuracy: VERIFIED (NBS CPI monthly state tables 2024, annual avg, old base 2009=100)
states.electricity_accuracy: ESTIMATED (NBS GHS-Panel W5 2023/24 zonal avg: SW=72.6%, calibrated to Lagos urban ratio)
states.inflation_accuracy: ESTIMATED (NBS CPI 2024 state annual avg, old base 2009=100, urban-skewed lower)
